result:
Here are the key files and functions involved in inventory stock calculation:

### Core Models

| File | Key Functions |
|------|--------------|
| `app/Inventory.php` | `stockTransaction()`, `stockRequisition()`, `updateInventory()` (line ~4311) â€” core stock update: computes change in quantity, new inventory, and inventory cost |
| `app/StockLedger.php` | `addStockLedger()` â€” creates ledger entries (opening stock, stock in/out, closing stock) |
| `app/stockAudit.php` | `closeStockAudit()` â€” stock audit operations |

### Controllers

| File | Key Methods |
|------|-------------|
| `app/Http/Controllers/InventoryController.php` | `getInventoryLevel()`, `stockTransaction()`, `stockRequisition()`, `getStockTransferDetails()` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/InventoryWeb.php` | `getInventoryLevel()`, `stockTransaction()`, `bulkStockTransactionWeb()`, `stockRequisition()`, `multiStockRequisition()` |

### Report / Calculation Logic

| File | Key Methods |
|------|-------------|
| `app/report.php` | `getInventoryLevel()` (line ~4399) â€” queries `catalogue`/`productPrices` for stock levels |
| `app/v2/report.php` | `getStockMovement()` (line ~5550), `getStockMovementNew()` (line ~5891), `getStoreWiseInventoryLevel()` (line ~5351), `getProdStockMovement()` (line ~6223), `getStockTransferDetails()` (line ~6927) |

### Services

| File | Key Methods |
|------|-------------|
| `app/Services/WeightedAverageService.php` | `calculateWeightedAverageCost()` â€” formula: `(existingQty Ã— existingCost + newQty Ã— newCost) / totalQty` |

### Jobs

- `app/Jobs/StockJob.php` â€” calls `updateInventory()`
- `app/Jobs/StockLedgerJob.php` â€” calls `addStockLedger()`
- `app/Jobs/StockAuditJob.php`, `SendStockAlertJob.php`, `fixStoreStockLevel.php`
- Integration jobs: `NavisionStockJob.php`, `CasioStockInJob.php`, `EasyEcomInventoryUpdateJob.php`, `UnicommerceInventoryUpdateJob.php`

### Schema (key tables in `cloud_schema/`)

- **`chain.sql`**: `stockLedgerSummary`, `stockLedgerDetail`, `stockTransactionSummary`, `stockTransactionDetail`, `stockRequisitionSummary/Detail`, `stockBatchSummary/Detail`, `stockAuditSummary/Detail`, `stockDiscrepancyDetail`
- **`store.sql`**: `catalogue` (per-store inventory, `inventory` column)
- **`warehouse.sql`**: `ware{ID}_catalogue`, `ware{ID}_prodVariantCatalogue` (warehouse inventory)

### Key Formulas

```
Closing Stock = Opening Stock + Stock In âˆ’ Stock Transfers âˆ’ Stock Out/Wastage
Inventory Cost Update = Old Cost âˆ’ (Î”Quantity Ã— Unit Cost Price)
Weighted Avg Cost = (ExistingQty Ã— ExistingCost + NewQty Ã— NewCost) / TotalQty
```
